## 题目1.<font style="color:rgb(31, 35, 40);">eeeeez_r</font>
### 题目：   
’’’

from Crypto.Util.number import *  
from secrets import randbits

p = getPrime(512)  
q = getPrime(512)

n = p * q  
e = 65537

m = bytes_to_long(flag)

c = pow(m, e, n)

print("p =", p)  
print("q =", q)  
print("e =", e)  
print("c =", c)  
'''  
p = 7833526559350210716763736624276871338973265302039384005037668270722459749111510212645578582715412039060908556429504391788904499303021963918033838457712021  
q = 11274522482114648167653425707657117942167215969612324249057858493398092816663094339833695146914712716091767834292452373966791325922322967827879446489910963  
e = 65537  
c =   
'''

’’’

### 解题脚本
’’’

from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes, inverse

p = 7833526559350210716763736624276871338973265302039384005037668270722459749111510212645578582715412039060908556429504391788904499303021963918033838457712021  
q = 11274522482114648167653425707657117942167215969612324249057858493398092816663094339833695146914712716091767834292452373966791325922322967827879446489910963  
e = 65537  
c = 

phin = (p-1)_(q-1)  
d = inverse(e, phin)  
m = pow(c, d, p*_q)  
flag = long_to_bytes(m).decode()  
print(flag)

’’’

得到：  

  flag{W31c0m3_T0_Crypt0}

### 解题思路  
已知p、q、e, 

φ(p)=p^(k−1)(p−1),又N=p*q; 则φ(n)=(p-1)(q-1);  

则计算φ(n)将结果赋值给phi;然后根据ed的关系，求d即求e在模φ(n)下的逆元，通过函数inverse可得d;  

解密m等于c^d modN，同样，通过pow可得m，最后将得出的明文数字转换成字节串再转换成字符串，得到flag  

## 作业2  
## 作业3  
## 为什么选择Crypto方向  
本身对密码感兴趣，又是这个专业的，想来学一点更深入的东西
